## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize SEMrush Enterprise agreement details and pricing for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is ready to proceed with SEMrush Enterprise (Silver plan), aiming to sign by month-end](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Pricing requested for 12 and 25 user options; target budget \~$7,500-$8,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Key considerations: API continuity, user access levels, payment terms (quarterly wire transfer)](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Topics

### Current SEMrush Usage & Transition

  - [GrowthX currently has 47 users on monthly core plan](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Using SEMrush API in existing workflow; critical to maintain API key continuity](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Transitioning to Enterprise requires matching core and enterprise user counts](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Guest users have limited access (can view reports but not execute workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)

### User Access Requirements

  - [11-12 director-level users need full enterprise access](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Additional 12-13 managing editors may need access (total 24-25 users)](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Remaining users could potentially be downgraded to guest status](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Guest users can view reports but cannot action items in core product](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Pricing and Contract Terms

  - [Requested pricing for both 12 and 25 user options](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Target budget: $7,500-$8,000 per month](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Enterprise plans typically don't offer user-based discounts](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Payment terms: Quarterly payments required (no monthly option for Enterprise)](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Payment method: Wire transfer or ACH only (no credit cards for Enterprise)](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)

### Contract Details

  - [Annual commitment required for Enterprise plan](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Silver package includes: 100 projects, 10,000 keywords, 20,000 page speed insights, 500 monthly service credits, 2 million API units](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Includes Google Search Console and GA4 integrations](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Next Steps

  - [SEMrush to send updated pricing proposal for 12 and 25 user options](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide legal company name and address](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [GrowthX to confirm Bridget as signatory and provide her contact details](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Schedule potential follow-up call to finalize agreement](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [SEMrush to prepare and send contract to Bridget once details are confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/1Ugg5LJF5KgxMqxXhZwffDMBrE29Aram?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
